Uses of Class
it.tdlight.jni.TdApi.LogStream

  • Uses of TdApi.LogStream in it.tdlight.jni

    Subclasses of TdApi.LogStream in it.tdlight.jni
    Modifier and Type Class Description
    static class  TdApi.LogStreamDefault
    The log is written to stderr or an OS specific log.
    static class  TdApi.LogStreamEmpty
    The log is written nowhere.
    static class  TdApi.LogStreamFile
    The log is written to a file.
    Fields in it.tdlight.jni declared as TdApi.LogStream
    Modifier and Type Field Description
    TdApi.LogStream TdApi.SetLogStream.logStream
    New log stream.
    Constructors in it.tdlight.jni with parameters of type TdApi.LogStream
    Constructor Description
    SetLogStream​(TdApi.LogStream logStream)
    Sets new log stream for internal logging of TDLib.
